---
name: Question or support
about: Use this template for usage questions, not bugs
title: "[Q] "
labels: ["question"]
assignees: []
---

## What are you trying to do?

A short description of the goal. E.g. "I want to export only the
benches that failed compliance, not the full report."

## What have you tried so far?

Steps you took, docs you read, settings you tweaked.

## Environment

- **Mode**: [ ] Web app  [ ] Streamlit (`streamlit run app.py`)
- **Backend**: [ ] Local  [ ] Render  [ ] Other (please specify)
- **Browser/OS** (for the web app):

## Question

Your question, as specific as you can make it. If you have a small
repro or screenshot, attach it.

## Relevant files

- [ ] docs (README / AGENTS.md / ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [ ] source (`core/`, `api/`, `web/`)
- [ ] demo (`scripts/generate_demo_data.py`, `web/public/demo/`)

## Best alternative (if any)

If you found a workaround that "works" but isn't ideal, share it.
Future readers will appreciate the breadcrumb.
